title: Šibenik、Šibenik-Knin — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Šibenik、Šibenik-Kninの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

ŠibenikはŠibenik-Kninにある人口46,332の都市です。A historic Dalmatian city with the UNESCO-listed St. James Cathedral, a stunning fortress complex, and access to the beautiful Kornati Islands and Krka National Park.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
